summary: Search songs by lyrics and natural-language mood or theme.

introduced: Music search matches lyric lines via LRCLib and resolves them to Apple Music tracks
Semantic search expands mood and theme requests (e.g. sad breakup song) into catalog queries
changed: Search field accepts titles, artists, lyrics phrases, and plain-language descriptions
Lyrics matches show the matched line under each search result
updated: Apple Intelligence on macOS 26 expands natural-language music queries when available
